name: diagram-generator
description: Generate Draw.io, Mermaid, and Excalidraw diagrams from structured prompts using an MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Generate editable Draw.io, Mermaid, and Excalidraw diagrams.
interface.longDescription: A diagram generation plugin that combines an interactive diagram planning skill with an MCP server for generating Draw.io, Mermaid, and Excalidraw files.
